_comment: Senior commercial leaders who recently changed jobs (last 90 days). Recent job-changers are a strong warm signal — they're often re-evaluating their stack and processes in their new role. Combine with a broad title filter to catch a wide range of decision-makers.

values.text: ("VP Sales" OR "VP Marketing" OR "Head of Sales" OR "Head of Marketing" OR "Chief Revenue Officer" OR CRO OR "Chief Marketing Officer" OR CMO) NOT (Fractional OR Interim OR Consultant)
